# MediaManagementAllowedMedia.Mount-controls

**Device Management Profile**

A dictionary of volumes to control volume mounting.

## Declaration

```swift
object MediaManagementAllowedMedia.Mount-controls
```

## Objects

- **MediaManagementAllowedMedia.Logout-eject**: A dictionary of volumes to eject when the user logs out.
- **MediaManagementAllowedMedia.Unmount-controls**: A dictionary to control volume unmounting.

items.description: A dictionary of volumes to eject when the user logs out.
